title: Just Item Cleaner
description: A mod that added a simplified command to clean up items quickly.
body:
Have you ever felt that using the /kill @e[type=item] command to clean up items is very complex and time-consuming?  

If you think so, this mod will help you.  

This mod added a simplified command to clean up items instead of the /kill @e [type=item] command.  

You can enter the /itcl command to quickly clean items that dropped on the ground.  

This mod is for client only.
